releaseNotes:
fix(auth): officeType is a number, not a string (0.1.4)

Gatekeeper returns validate.officeType as a JSON number (confirmed against the
portal's ValidateModel: officeType: number). The app modeled it as String, so
validate parsing threw SerializationException → sign-in reported failure even
though sign-in + validate both returned 200. Change ValidateData/UserIdentity
officeType to Int; isWarehouseAdmin compares to 1. Tests updated. bump 0.1.4.
